description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet made from light-colored wood, featuring a minimalist Scandinavian-inspired design. The front face displays a single-door compartment on the left and three horizontal drawers on the right, all with subtle, integrated handles. The cabinet stands on four short, angled wooden legs, elevating it slightly above the ground and giving it a modern, airy appearance. The surfaces are smooth and matte, with a natural wood grain visible throughout. There are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms on the drawers or door. The overall look is clean, functional, and well-suited for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A light wood filing cabinet with three drawers and a door, standing on angled legs with a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers on the right and a single-door compartment on the left, with integrated handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, flat wooden panel and the angled legs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat wooden back panel and the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain wooden panel and angled legs, mirroring the left side.
